citation: Singh G, Garg S, Damle SG, Dhindsa A, Kaur A, Singla S. (2014). A study of sports related occurrence of traumatic orodental injuries and associated risk factors in high school students in north India. Asian journal of sports medicine.
extraction_notes: 1105 students from 19 school sports teams/academies, multistage cluster sampling. Soft tissue 48%, tooth fractures 43%. High-velocity sports 44.1% and medium-intensity 46.6% of injuries. MG use: boys 6%, girls 2%.
